executive_summary: Build workflow dispatch failed with HTTP 404 error. The GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) was not found or is not accessible in the repository. This is a critical configuration error that prevents any build execution from occurring. The workflow dispatch API endpoint returned 404 status, indicating either missing workflow file, insufficient token permissions, or disabled GitHub Actions.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build.yml workflow. This indicates the workflow file does not exist at the expected path (.github/workflows/build.yml) or is not accessible.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The build.yml workflow file is missing from the .github/workflows/ directory in the scib_demo repository on the main branch. The GitHub Actions API cannot locate the workflow file to dispatch.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or restored. This blocks all CI/CD automation, testing, and deployment processes.

steps: Add build.yml workflow file with proper Maven build configuration
Ensure workflow has workflow_dispatch trigger enabled
Verify GitHub Actions is enabled for the repository
Confirm GitHub token has workflow and actions permissions

errors.title: GitHub Actions API Authentication/Permission Issue
errors.description: The 404 error may also indicate insufficient permissions on the GitHub token used for workflow dispatch, or GitHub Actions may be disabled for this repository.
errors.error_message: Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled.
errors.root_cause: The GitHub personal access token (PAT) may lack the required 'workflow' and 'actions' scopes, or GitHub Actions feature is disabled at the repository or organization level.
errors.impact: Prevents automated workflow dispatch even if workflow file exists. Blocks CI/CD automation and requires manual intervention.

steps: Check GitHub token scopes include 'workflow' and 'repo' permissions
Verify GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings
Confirm organization policies allow Actions usage
Test token with GitHub API: GET /repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows
Regenerate token with correct scopes if needed

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Build failure classified as CONFIGURATION_ERROR. No Maven build logs available due to workflow dispatch failure. Error occurred at GitHub Actions API level before build execution.
compliance_notes.sla_impact: High - Blocks all builds and deployments
next_steps: Verify GitHub Actions enabled and token permissions
Test workflow dispatch manually via GitHub UI
Re-run build after configuration fixes applied

diagnostic_details.repository_structure_check: Required: .github/workflows/ directory must exist with build.yml file
diagnostic_details.maven_build_logs: Not available - build did not execute due to workflow dispatch failure

fix_actions.check: Ensure Actions enabled and permissions configured

automated_remediation.rollback_plan: No rollback needed - creating new workflow file
automated_remediation.testing_required: Manual workflow dispatch test after file creation
